display.purpose: Julius Sans One, uppercase, wide tracking. Hero wordmark only.

body.purpose: Montserrat Regular. All reading copy, navigation, UI. Center-aligned by default.

label.purpose: Montserrat, uppercase, 0.2em+ tracking. Micro labels and badges, 4 words max.

shadows.name: cover-lift
shadows.purpose: The single sanctioned drop-shadow. Lifts cover art / thumbnails and status badges off the canvas.

shadows.name: frosted-header
shadows.purpose: The sticky header floats as a translucent frosted bar over the forest photo.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default ease-in-out for color, background, and transform state transitions (200-300ms).

motion.name: theme-reveal
motion.purpose: View Transitions circular reveal from the toggle's click point when switching theme; honors prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: v-wave-ripple
motion.purpose: Tactile ripple on every interactive link, nav item, and button.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Inverted-ink primary action: white fill with dark text in the default dark theme.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; height:36px; padding:8px 16px; border:none; border-radius:6px; background:oklch(1 0 0); color:oklch(0.18 0.02 155); font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:400; cursor:pointer; transition:background .2s ease-in-out, transform .2s ease-in-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:oklch(1 0 0 / 90%); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform:translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:none; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px oklch(1 0 0 / 50%); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Bare border on a translucent fill; the header Sign In action. Icon inlined.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; height:36px; padding:8px 16px; border:1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 20%); border-radius:6px; background:oklch(1 0 0 / 4%); color:oklch(1 0 0); font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:400; cursor:pointer; transition:background .3s ease-in-out, border-color .3s ease-in-out; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background:oklch(1 0 0 / 12%); border-color:oklch(1 0 0 / 40%); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline:none; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px oklch(1 0 0 / 50%); }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Header navigation item: ghost button that frosts on hover and holds a subtle fill when active.
components.html: ReleasesArtistsVideos
components.css: .ds-nav { display:flex; gap:4px; } .ds-nav-link { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; height:56px; padding:0 16px; border-radius:2px; background:transparent; color:oklch(1 0 0); font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:400; text-decoration:none; transition:background-color .3s ease-in-out; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background:oklch(1 0 0 / 30%); } .ds-nav-link[aria-current="page"] { background:oklch(1 0 0 / 20%); }

components.name: Thumbnail Card
components.description: The signature Item card: cover framed in black/50 with the cover-lift shadow and a 2-line title. Hover raises a translucent backdrop.
components.html: Time Loop: Beyond Borders
components.css: .ds-thumb { display:block; width:140px; text-decoration:none; color:oklch(1 0 0); font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; } .ds-thumb__frame { display:block; width:120px; aspect-ratio:1 / 1; margin:0 auto 6px; border-radius:4px; background:oklch(0 0 0 / 50%); box-shadow:0 2px 10px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.5); overflow:hidden; transition:outline .2s ease-in-out; outline:0 solid oklch(1 0 0 / 0%); } .ds-thumb__art { display:block; width:100%; height:100%; background:linear-gradient(135deg, oklch(0.45 0.09 155), oklch(0.22 0.05 320)); } .ds-thumb__title { display:block; font-size:14px; line-height:1.3; } .ds-thumb:hover .ds-thumb__frame { outline:6px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 12%); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: shadcn input: single border on a translucent fill, 3px ring on focus, on-theme placeholder.
components.css: .ds-input { width:240px; height:36px; padding:0 12px; border:1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 20%); border-radius:6px; background:oklch(1 0 0 / 4%); color:oklch(1 0 0); font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-size:14px; } .ds-input::placeholder { color:oklch(1 0 0 / 50%); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline:none; border-color:oklch(1 0 0 / 50%); box-shadow:0 0 0 3px oklch(1 0 0 / 50%); }

components.name: Hero Wordmark
components.description: The home hero thesis: Julius Sans One capitals, white over the forest, size and tracking scaling together.
components.css: .ds-hero { font-family:'Julius Sans One',sans-serif; font-weight:400; text-transform:uppercase; color:oklch(1 0 0); text-align:center; line-height:1.4; } .ds-hero__title { font-size:70px; letter-spacing:8px; margin:0 0 0.2em; } .ds-hero__sub { font-size:70px; letter-spacing:11px; } .ds-hero__desc { font-size:16px; letter-spacing:12px; margin-top:1em; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Tiny corner status tag on cover art: Out Now (red-600) or Coming Soon (green-600).
components.html: Out Now Coming Soon
components.css: .ds-badge { display:inline-block; padding:4px 6px; border-radius:2px; font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-size:10px; line-height:1; color:#fff; box-shadow:0 2px 10px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } .ds-badge--out { background:#dc2626; } .ds-badge--soon { background:#16a34a; }

narrative.overview: Sentimony is a nocturnal psychedelic rite held in a green-black forest. The default theme is dark, and the deepest layer of the page is a photographic canopy of trees seen at dusk; everything above it floats in translucent green-tinted neutrals. The interface does not announce itself. It is quiet, atmospheric, and near-monochrome, so that the music's artwork and the artists' names are the only things that carry real color. Hierarchy is built from scale, letter-spacing, and translucency, never from loud chrome. The type carries the ritual: display words are set in the thin inscriptional capitals of Julius Sans One and widen their tracking as they grow, while body and UI sit in a single regular weight of Montserrat. There is no bold anywhere; the whole site is drawn with one stroke weight. The single concession to heat is oxblood, a clotted blood-red that appears only on hover-revealed micro-surfaces.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-default, with a photographic forest as the lowest layer; light theme is a pale-mist secondary.
Green-tinted monochrome neutrals (every neutral carries hue 155, no true grays).
One stroke weight (Regular 400) for both display and body; hierarchy from scale + tracking + case.
Tonal layering by alpha, not shadow; depth comes from translucency and the background photo.
A single rare accent (oxblood #8a0202); color otherwise belongs to artwork.

rules.name: The Green Monochrome Rule
rules.body: Every neutral carries hue 155 at low chroma (0.01-0.02). There are no true grays. A neutral that reads cool-blue or warm-cream is wrong; tint it back toward forest green.

rules.name: The Oxblood Rule
rules.body: Oxblood (#8a0202) is the only saturated hue permitted to touch chrome, and only on hover-revealed micro-surfaces. Forbidden on buttons, headings, backgrounds, and anything visible at rest.

rules.name: The Artwork-Owns-Color Rule
rules.body: The interface is monochrome so release covers, artist photos, and event flyers are the only saturated objects on screen. Never add a colored UI element that competes with the art.

rules.name: The Single-Weight Rule
rules.body: Only Regular (400) is loaded for both families. Build all hierarchy from scale, letter-spacing, and case. Synthetic bold is forbidden.

rules.name: The Breathing Caps Rule
rules.body: Display capitals widen their tracking as they grow (about 0.05em at 40px up to 0.14em at 100px). Tight display type is forbidden; large capitals must breathe like a slow chant.

rules.name: The Tonal Layering Rule
rules.body: Surfaces separate by alpha tint, never raised shadow. Black/white overlays at 5-30% build the hierarchy. The only drop-shadow permitted is the soft 0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5) under cover art and badges.

rules.name: The Photographic Depth Rule
rules.body: In dark mode the deepest layer is the forest photograph, fixed and full-bleed; frosted blurred panels float over it. Never flatten the dark theme to a solid fill that hides the photo.

dos: Do keep every neutral on hue 155 at low chroma (0.01-0.02). Tint toward forest green, never cool-blue or warm-cream.
Do build hierarchy from scale, letter-spacing, and case. Only Regular (400) exists, go larger or wider, never heavier.
Do widen display tracking as type grows (up to 0.14em at 100px). Large capitals must breathe.

Do separate surfaces with alpha overlays (5-30%) tinted by the theme's ink (white/X in dark, black/X in light). Use the dark: variant pattern so the dark theme stays pixel-identical when you touch the light one.
Do let release covers, artist photos, and flyers be the only saturated objects on screen.
Do keep the dark theme's forest photograph visible; float frosted, blurred panels over it.
Do set borders per instance (e.g. border-white/20); there is no global border-border base layer.
donts: Don't introduce a cream / sand / beige background. The light theme is pale green Mist (oklch(0.97 0.01 155)), never warm paper.
Don't add neon cyber-rave chrome: no purple-pink gradients, no glow, no glassmorphism as decoration, no gradient text.
Don't build a corporate-streaming wall of flat, bright, identical cards. Cards here are quiet thumbnails framed in black/50.
Don't ship generic SaaS / AI-dashboard scaffolding: no cream hero, no tiny uppercase eyebrow above every section, no numbered 01 / 02 section markers, no identical icon-heading-text card grids.
Don't use 2014 skeuomorphism: no deep shadows, no bevels, no gradient or embossed buttons. The only shadow allowed is 0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5).
Don't use Oxblood (#8a0202) anywhere visible at rest. It is hover-only, micro-surface-only.
Don't reach for bold or synthetic-bold weights, and never set body sentences in all-caps. Uppercase is for display and labels of 4 words or fewer.
Don't use border-left/border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
